# viettelidc_ovpc_nat_gateway (Data Source)

Lookup a NAT Gateway by ID or name in a VPC.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) NAT Gateway ID (vttNatId). Either 'id' or 'name' must be specified.
- `name` (String) Name of the NAT Gateway to look up. Either 'id' or 'name' must be specified.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID to search within. Uses provider default if not specified.

### Read-Only

- `connect_type` (Boolean) Connection type. True if using dedicated connection.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the NAT Gateway was created.
- `floating_ip` (String) The floating IP address assigned to the NAT Gateway.
- `floating_ip_id` (String) ID of the floating IP assigned to the NAT Gateway.
- `internet_gateway_id` (String) ID of the Internet Gateway used for outbound traffic.
- `status` (String) Current status of the NAT Gateway.
- `subnet_id` (String) ID of the subnet where the NAT Gateway is placed.
